quiz.question: ______ stall
quiz.explanation: 摊位, 市场摊位. Vendors sold produce from their market stall. 小贩从他们的市场摊位出售农产品。 | stall->摊位/停滞，market stall->市场摊位

quiz.question: forestall _ ______
quiz.explanation: 预防, 预防危机. Quick action helped forestall a crisis. 迅速行动帮助预防了危机。 | fore->提前，stall->阻止，forestall->提前阻止=预防

quiz.question: install ________
quiz.explanation: 安装, 安装软件. The technician will install software on all computers. 技术人员将在所有计算机上安装软件。 | in->进入，stall->摊位/位置，install->放入指定位置=安装

quiz.question: ______ squall
quiz.explanation: 暴风, 突然的暴风. A sudden squall caught sailors by surprise. 突然的暴风让水手措手不及。 | squall->尖叫/暴风（象声词，风的嚎叫声）

quiz.question: stonewall ________
quiz.explanation: 阻碍, 阻碍质询. The official tried to stonewall question from reporters. 官员试图阻碍记者的质询。 | stone->石头，wall->墙，stonewall->筑石墙阻挡=拒绝回答

quiz.question: fell _____
quiz.explanation: 凶猛的, 一举. The army took the city in one fell swoop. 军队一举拿下了这座城市。 | fell->凶猛的（古英语），one fell swoop->一击即中=一举

quiz.question: pell-mell ____
quiz.explanation: 混乱地, 混乱的冲刺. People made a pell-mell rush for the exits. 人们混乱地冲向出口。 | pell-mell->乱作一团（法语pêle-mêle，混乱混杂）

quiz.question: _____ mill
quiz.explanation: 磨坊, 谷物磨坊. The old grain mill still operates today. 古老的谷物磨坊今天仍在运营。 | mill->磨，grain mill->磨谷物的坊=谷物磨坊

quiz.question: _____ drill
quiz.explanation: 钻头, 电钻. The carpenter used a power drill for the job. 木匠用电钻完成工作。 | drill->钻孔/操练，power drill->电动钻头

quiz.question: distill _____
quiz.explanation: 蒸馏, 蒸馏水. The lab equipment can distill water for experiments. 实验室设备可以为实验蒸馏水。 | di->分开，still->滴落，distill->使液体滴落分离=蒸馏

quiz.question: instill ______
quiz.explanation: 灌输, 灌输价值观. Parents work to instill values in their children. 父母努力向孩子灌输价值观。 | in->向内，still->滴入，instill->一滴一滴注入=灌输

quiz.question: ______ knoll
quiz.explanation: 小山丘, 长满草的小山丘. They picnicked on a grassy knoll overlooking the valley. 他们在俯瞰山谷的长满草的小山丘上野餐。 | knoll->小圆丘（cf. kneel跪，膝盖高度的小丘）

quiz.question: ____ poll
quiz.explanation: 民意调查, 出口民意调查. The exit poll predicted election results accurately. 出口民意调查准确预测了选举结果。 | poll->头部/计数，exit poll->出口处清点意见=出口民调

quiz.question: droll _____
quiz.explanation: 滑稽的, 滑稽的幽默. His droll humor kept everyone entertained. 他滑稽的幽默让每个人都很开心。 | droll->滚动的小人（荷兰语trol），droll->逗趣滑稽的

quiz.question: stroll ______
quiz.explanation: 漫步, 四处漫步. Couples stroll around the park at sunset. 情侣们在日落时分四处漫步于公园。 | stroll->悠闲滚动前行=漫步（cf. scroll卷轴/滚动）

quiz.question: ____ toll
quiz.explanation: 通行费, 道路通行费. Drivers must pay road toll to use the highway. 司机必须支付道路通行费才能使用高速公路。 | toll->计数/敲钟/收费，road toll->过路费

quiz.question: dull ____
quiz.explanation: 钝痛, 钝痛. He felt a dull ache in his shoulder. 他感到肩膀有钝痛。 | dull->迟钝/不锋利，dull ache->不锐利的痛=钝痛

quiz.question: ___ gull
quiz.explanation: 海鸥, 海鸥. A sea gull circled overhead looking for food. 一只海鸥在头顶盘旋寻找食物。 | gull->海鸥/欺骗，sea gull->海上的鸟=海鸥

quiz.question: ____ hull
quiz.explanation: 船体, 船体. The ship hull was damaged by the rocks. 船体被岩石损坏。 | hull->外壳/剥壳，ship hull->船的外壳=船体

quiz.question: ________ idyll
quiz.explanation: 田园诗, 田园牧歌. The poem described a pastoral idyll of rural life. 这首诗描述了乡村生活的田园牧歌。 | idyll->小画/小诗（希腊），idyll->田园牧歌（cf. idol偶像，同音近形）

quiz.question: ___ idol
quiz.explanation: 偶像, 流行偶像. The teenager's room was covered with pop idol posters. 青少年的房间里贴满了流行偶像海报。 | idol->形象/偶像（cf. idyll田园诗，注意区分）

quiz.question: menthol _____
quiz.explanation: 薄荷醇, 薄荷糖. The menthol candy soothed her sore throat. 薄荷糖缓解了她的喉咙痛。 | menth->薄荷，ol->醇，menthol->薄荷醇

quiz.question: _____ whirlpool
quiz.explanation: 漩涡, 水漩涡. The water whirlpool pulled debris under the surface. 水漩涡将碎片拉到水面下。 | whirl->旋转，pool->水池，whirlpool->旋转的水=漩涡

quiz.question: ______ spool
quiz.explanation: 线轴, 线轴. She wound the thread spool for sewing. 她缠绕线轴以备缝纫。 | spool->线圈/轴（cf. pool合并，同韵）

quiz.question: ____ carol
quiz.explanation: 颂歌, 唱颂歌. Children gather to sing carol at Christmas. 孩子们聚在一起在圣诞节唱颂歌。 | carol->欢唱/颂歌（cf. chorus合唱）

quiz.question: pistol ____
quiz.explanation: 手枪, 手枪射击. The race began with a pistol shot. 比赛以手枪射击开始。 | pistol->手枪（捷克pist->管子），pistol shot->手枪射击

quiz.question: extol ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 赞美, 赞美美德. The speaker continued to extol the virtues of hard work. 演讲者继续赞美努力工作的美德。 | ex->向上，tol->举起，extol->高高举起=颂扬

quiz.question: _____ churl
quiz.explanation: 粗人, 脾气坏的粗人. The surly churl refused to help anyone. 脾气坏的粗人拒绝帮助任何人。 | churl->农奴/粗鄙之人，churlish->粗鲁无礼的

quiz.question: ______ overhaul
quiz.explanation: 大修, 发动机大修. The mechanic performed an engine overhaul. 机械师进行了发动机大修。 | over->全面，haul->拖拉，overhaul->全面拖出检修=大修

quiz.question: maul _ ______
quiz.explanation: 撕咬, 撕咬受害者. The wild animal could maul a victim severely. 野生动物可能会严重撕咬受害者。 | maul->重锤/猛击，maul->像锤击一样撕打

quiz.question: resourceful ______
quiz.explanation: 足智多谋的, 足智多谋的领导者. The resourceful leader found solutions to every problem. 足智多谋的领导者为每个问题找到了解决方案。 | resource->资源，resourceful->善用资源的=足智多谋的

quiz.question: vengeful ______
quiz.explanation: 复仇的, 复仇的精神. The legend spoke of a vengeful spirit. 传说讲述了一个复仇的精神。 | venge->复仇，vengeful->充满复仇欲的（cf. avenge复仇）

quiz.question: dutiful ___
quiz.explanation: 尽职的, 尽职的儿子. The dutiful son cared for his aging parents. 尽职的儿子照顾年迈的父母。 | duty->职责，dutiful->充满职责感的=尽职的

quiz.question: willful _______
quiz.explanation: 故意的, 故意的忽视. The charge was willful neglect of duty. 指控是故意忽视职责。 | will->意志/故意，willful->出于意志的=故意的

quiz.question: blissful _______
quiz.explanation: 幸福的, 幸福的寂静. They enjoyed blissful silence in the countryside. 他们在乡村享受幸福的寂静。 | bliss->极乐，blissful->充满极乐的=幸福的

quiz.question: fitful _____
quiz.explanation: 断断续续的, 断断续续的睡眠. Anxiety caused fitful sleep throughout the night. 焦虑导致整夜断断续续的睡眠。 | fit->发作/间歇，fitful->一阵一阵发作的=断断续续的

quiz.question: ________ mogul
quiz.explanation: 大亨, 商业大亨. The business mogul owned multiple companies. 商业大亨拥有多家公司。 | mogul->蒙古大汗，mogul->权贵大亨

quiz.question: annul ________
quiz.explanation: 废除, 废除婚姻. The court decided to annul marriage on legal grounds. 法院决定以法律理由废除婚姻。 | an->加强，nul->零/无效，annul->使归零=废除

quiz.question: foul _____
quiz.explanation: 恶臭的, 恶臭味. A foul smell filled the room. 恶臭味充满了房间。 | foul->腐烂/污秽，foul smell->令人厌恶的气味（cf. fowl禽类，同音）

quiz.question: _______ consul
quiz.explanation: 领事, 意大利领事. The Italian consul assisted citizens abroad. 意大利领事在海外协助公民。 | consul->共同商议者（拉丁），consul->领事（cf. council议会）

quiz.question: ______ awl
quiz.explanation: 锥子, 缝纫锥子. The cobbler used a sewing awl for leather work. 鞋匠使用缝纫锥子进行皮革工作。 | awl->锥子（古英语æl），sewing awl->缝纫用锥子

quiz.question: trawl ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 搜寻, 搜寻数据. Researchers trawl for data in archives. 研究人员在档案中搜寻数据。 | trawl->拖网捕鱼，trawl for data->像拖网一样搜寻数据

quiz.question: _______ sibyl
quiz.explanation: 女预言家, 古代女预言家. The ancient sibyl prophesied future events. 古代女预言家预言未来事件。 | sibyl->古希腊罗马神话中的女先知，sibylline->神秘预言的

quiz.question: _____ beam
quiz.explanation: 光束, 激光束. The laser beam cut through the metal. 激光束切割金属。 | beam->光束/梁，laser beam->激光束

quiz.question: seam _________
quiz.explanation: 缝, 缝份. The pattern includes seam allowance measurements. 图案包括缝份尺寸。 | seam->缝合线（cf. seem看似，同音），seam allowance->缝份

quiz.question: _____ amalgam
quiz.explanation: 混合物, 金属混合物. Dentists used metal amalgam for fillings. 牙医使用金属混合物进行填充。 | amal->软化，gam->汞，amalgam->汞与金属的混合=合金/混合物

quiz.question: _______ logjam
quiz.explanation: 僵局, 交通僵局. The accident created a traffic logjam on the highway. 事故在高速公路上造成了交通僵局。 | log->原木，jam->堵塞，logjam->原木堵塞河道=僵局

quiz.question: ____ clam
quiz.explanation: 蛤蜊, 硬壳蛤蜊. Divers collected hard clam from the ocean floor. 潜水员从海底收集硬壳蛤蜊。 | clam->夹住（蛤蜊紧夹），clam up->闭口不言（像蛤蜊一样夹紧）

quiz.question: _______ loam
quiz.explanation: 壤土, 肥沃的壤土. The garden had rich fertile loam for planting. 花园有丰富的肥沃壤土用于种植。 | loam->黏土质壤土（砂土+黏土+腐殖质的混合）

quiz.question: ram _______
quiz.explanation: 猛推, 强行通过. The government tried to ram through legislation. 政府试图强行通过立法。 | ram->公羊/撞击，ram through->像公羊冲撞一样强行推过

quiz.question: ___ _____ diagram
quiz.explanation: 图表, 条形图. The presentation included a bar chart diagram. 演示文稿包括条形图。 | dia->穿过，gram->写/画，diagram->画出来的图=图表

quiz.question: ____ anagram
quiz.explanation: 字谜, 单词字谜. Solving the word anagram required rearranging letters. 解决单词字谜需要重新排列字母。 | ana->重新，gram->字母，anagram->重新排列字母=字谜

quiz.question: _____ epigram
quiz.explanation: 警句, 机智的警句. The author was famous for witty epigram. 作者以机智的警句而闻名。 | epi->在上面，gram->写，epigram->题刻在上面的话=警句

quiz.question: redeem ______
quiz.explanation: 兑换, 兑换优惠券. Customers can redeem coupon at checkout. 顾客可以在结账时兑换优惠券。 | re->回，deem->买回，redeem->买回=赎回/兑换

quiz.question: _______ stratagem
quiz.explanation: 计谋, 狡猾的计谋. The general devised a cunning stratagem. 将军设计了一个狡猾的计谋。 | strat->军队，agem->引导，stratagem->引导军队的手段=计谋

quiz.question: hem _ _____
quiz.explanation: 缝边, 给裙子缝边. The tailor will hem a skirt to the right length. 裁缝会把裙子缝边到合适的长度。 | hem->边缘/缝边，hem in->包围（围住边缘）

quiz.question: ________ anthem
quiz.explanation: 国歌, 国歌. The crowd stood for the national anthem. 人群站立聆听国歌。 | anti->对，phon->声音，anthem->对唱的歌=颂歌/国歌

quiz.question: _____ mayhem
quiz.explanation: 混乱, 城市混乱. The riot caused urban mayhem in the streets. 骚乱在街道上造成了城市混乱。 | maim->致残，mayhem->原指故意致残=蓄意破坏/大混乱

quiz.question: ____ apothegm
quiz.explanation: 格言, 智慧格言. The philosopher shared a wise apothegm. 哲学家分享了一句智慧格言。 | apo->离开，thegm->说话，apothegm->精炼说出的话=格言（cf. epigram警句）

quiz.question: ________ paradigm
quiz.explanation: 范例, 教学范例. The school adopted a new teaching paradigm. 学校采用了新的教学范例。 | para->旁边，digm->展示，paradigm->展示给旁人看的=范例/典范

quiz.question: ________ acclaim
quiz.explanation: 赞誉, 评论界赞誉. The film received critical acclaim from reviewers. 这部电影获得了评论界的赞誉。 | ac->朝向，claim->呼喊，acclaim->向某人呼喊喝彩=赞誉

quiz.question: declaim ______
quiz.explanation: 朗诵, 朗诵诗歌. The actor would declaim poetry dramatically. 演员会戏剧性地朗诵诗歌。 | de->加强，claim->呼喊，declaim->大声呼喊=慷慨激昂地朗诵

quiz.question: reclaim ____
quiz.explanation: 开垦, 开垦土地. Engineers worked to reclaim land from the sea. 工程师努力从海中开垦土地。 | re->重新，claim->要回，reclaim->重新要回=开垦/回收

quiz.question: disclaim ______________
quiz.explanation: 否认, 否认责任. The company tried to disclaim responsibility for damages. 公司试图否认对损害的责任。 | dis->否定，claim->声称，disclaim->否认声称=放弃/否认

quiz.question: ____ whim
quiz.explanation: 突发奇想, 无聊的突发奇想. He made decisions on idle whim rather than planning. 他根据无聊的突发奇想而不是计划做决定。 | whim->突发奇想，whimsical->异想天开的

quiz.question: denim ______
quiz.explanation: 牛仔布, 牛仔布夹克. She wore a classic denim jacket. 她穿着一件经典的牛仔布夹克。 | denim->来自法国Nîmes城的布料（de Nîmes->denim）

quiz.question: _____ interim
quiz.explanation: 过渡期间, 短暂的过渡期间. There was a short interim between leaders. 领导人之间有一个短暂的过渡期间。 | inter->之间，im->进入，interim->在两者之间的时期=过渡期

quiz.question: _________ pilgrim
quiz.explanation: 朝圣者, 宗教朝圣者. The religious pilgrim traveled to holy sites. 宗教朝圣者前往圣地。 | per->穿越，agri->田野，pilgrim->穿越田野的旅行者=朝圣者

quiz.question: prim _______
quiz.explanation: 拘谨的, 拘谨的举止. The lady maintained prim manners at all times. 这位女士始终保持拘谨的举止。 | prim->最初/整洁，prim->过分整洁拘谨（cf. prime首要的）

quiz.question: _____ verbatim
quiz.explanation: 逐字地, 逐字引用. Please quote verbatim from the original text. 请从原文逐字引用。 | verb->词/字，verbatim->逐字的（cf. verbal口头的）

quiz.question: vim ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 精力, 精力和活力. The young athlete played with vim and vigor. 年轻运动员精力充沛地比赛。 | vim->力量（拉丁vis的宾格），vim and vigor->精力与活力

quiz.question: _____ maxim
quiz.explanation: 格言, 道德格言. The teacher taught students a moral maxim. 老师向学生教授道德格言。 | max->最大，maxim->最高准则=格言（cf. maximum最大值）

quiz.question: ________ balm
quiz.explanation: 香膏, 舒缓香膏. The soothing balm relieved her dry skin. 舒缓香膏缓解了她的干燥皮肤。 | balm->香脂（balsam的缩写），balm->舒缓之物（cf. embalm防腐）

quiz.question: ___ realm __ ___
quiz.explanation: 领域, 艺术领域. His work explores the realm of art and science. 他的作品探索艺术和科学领域。 | real->王权，realm->王权管辖的范围=领域/王国

quiz.question: ____ _ psalm
quiz.explanation: 赞美诗, 唱赞美诗. The congregation gathered to sing a psalm. 会众聚集唱赞美诗。 | psalm->弹拨乐器伴奏的歌（p不发音），psalm->赞美诗

quiz.question: _ ______ qualm
quiz.explanation: 疑虑, 突然的疑虑. She felt a sudden qualm about the decision. 她对这个决定感到突然的疑虑。 | qualm->恶心/良心不安（l不发音），qualm->突来的疑虑/不适

quiz.question: elm ____
quiz.explanation: 榆树, 榆树. The old elm tree stood in the town square. 古老的榆树矗立在城镇广场上。 | elm->榆树（古英语），elm tree->榆树（著名如Elm Street榆树街）

quiz.question: ____ ___ helm
quiz.explanation: 舵, 掌舵. The new CEO will take the helm next month. 新任首席执行官将于下月掌舵。 | helm->舵/头盔（古英语），take the helm->掌舵=执掌领导权

quiz.question: whelm ____ _____
quiz.explanation: 淹没, 被悲伤淹没. Sorrow seemed to whelm with grief. 悲伤似乎被悲痛淹没。 | whelm->淹没/翻覆，overwhelm->彻底淹没（over加强）

quiz.question: overwhelm ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 压倒, 压倒感官. The spectacular view would overwhelm the senses. 壮观的景色会压倒感官。 | over->超过，whelm->淹没，overwhelm->完全淹没=压倒

quiz.question: boredom _________
quiz.explanation: 无聊, 无聊阈值. Everyone has a different boredom threshold. 每个人都有不同的无聊阈值。 | bore->钻孔/令人厌烦，boredom->无聊状态（-dom表状态）

quiz.question: ______ serfdom
quiz.explanation: 农奴制, 封建农奴制. The country abolished feudal serfdom centuries ago. 该国几个世纪前废除了封建农奴制。 | serf->农奴（拉丁servus奴隶），serfdom->农奴制度（-dom表制度）

quiz.question: random ______
quiz.explanation: 随机的, 随机样本. Researchers selected a random sample for the study. 研究人员为研究选择了随机样本。 | random->奔跑/无方向（古法语），random->无规律的=随机的

quiz.question: ____-_______ axiom
quiz.explanation: 公理, 不言而喻的公理. The declaration began with a self-evident axiom. 宣言以一个不言而喻的公理开始。 | axios->有价值（希腊），axiom->不需证明的真理=公理

quiz.question: ________ boom
quiz.explanation: 繁荣, 经济繁荣. The region experienced an economic boom. 该地区经历了经济繁荣。 | boom->爆炸声/激增，economic boom->经济爆炸式增长=经济繁荣

quiz.question: ______ heirloom
quiz.explanation: 传家宝, 家族传家宝. The ring is a precious family heirloom. 这枚戒指是珍贵的家族传家宝。 | heir->继承人，loom->织机，heirloom->传给继承人的织机=传家宝

quiz.question: _______ groom
quiz.explanation: 新郎, 婚礼新郎. The wedding groom nervously awaited his bride. 婚礼新郎紧张地等待他的新娘。 | groom->梳理/新郎，wedding groom->婚礼上被打扮好的男人=新郎

quiz.question: _ maelstrom __
quiz.explanation: 大漩涡, 大漩涡. The scandal created a maelstrom of controversy. 丑闻引起了争议的大漩涡。 | mael->研磨，strom->流，maelstrom->旋转研磨的水流=大漩涡

quiz.question: ___ ransom
quiz.explanation: 赎金, 支付赎金. The family refused to pay ransom to kidnappers. 家人拒绝向绑架者支付赎金。 | ransom->赎回（拉丁redemptio），ransom->赎金（cf. redeem赎回）

quiz.question: phantom ____
quiz.explanation: 幻影, 幻肢. Amputees sometimes experience phantom limb sensations. 截肢者有时会经历幻肢感觉。 | phant->显现，phantom->显现之物=幻影（cf. fantastic幻想的）

quiz.question: buxom ______
quiz.explanation: 丰满的, 丰满的身材. The painting depicted a woman with a buxom figure. 这幅画描绘了一个身材丰满的女人。 | buxom->柔顺/健壮（古英语），buxom->丰满健美的

quiz.question: _____ charm
quiz.explanation: 魅力, 幸运符. She carried a lucky charm for good fortune. 她带着一个幸运符以求好运。 | charm->歌唱/咒语（拉丁carmen），charm->魅力/护身符

quiz.question: disarm _________
quiz.explanation: 消除, 消除怀疑. His honest approach helped disarm suspicion. 他诚实的态度有助于消除怀疑。 | dis->去除，arm->武装，disarm->解除武装=消除（戒备/怀疑）

quiz.question: lukewarm ________
quiz.explanation: 冷淡的, 冷淡的反应. The proposal received only a lukewarm response. 该提议只得到了冷淡的反应。 | luke->温热（古英语），warm->暖，lukewarm->微温=不冷不热=冷淡的

quiz.question: germ ______
quiz.explanation: 细菌, 细菌理论. Pasteur developed the germ theory of disease. 巴斯德发展了疾病的细菌理论。 | germ->萌芽/种子，germ->病菌（最初指胚芽，后指致病微生物）

quiz.question: affirm ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 确认, 确认判决. The appeals court decided to affirm the verdict. 上诉法院决定确认判决。 | af->朝向，firm->坚定，affirm->使坚定=确认（cf. confirm再次确认）

quiz.question: infirm _______
quiz.explanation: 虚弱的, 虚弱的病人. The nurse cared for the infirm patient. 护士照顾虚弱的病人。 | in->否定，firm->坚强，infirm->不坚强的=虚弱的（cf. infirmary医务室）

quiz.question: confirm ___________
quiz.explanation: 确认, 确认预订. Please call to confirm reservation for dinner. 请致电确认晚餐预订。 | con->共同，firm->坚定，confirm->共同坚定=确认

quiz.question: ______ uniform
quiz.explanation: 制服, 校服. Students must wear school uniform daily. 学生必须每天穿校服。 | uni->一，form->形式，uniform->统一形式=制服/一致的

quiz.question: misinform ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 误导, 误导公众. False news can misinform the public. 假新闻会误导公众。 | mis->错误，inform->告知，misinform->错误告知=误导
